title: LEDControl Properties
description:
LEDControl Properties

LED Control Properties

The following list is a summary of the LED Control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

AllowStatusChange	Controls whether the operator can control
		 the state of the input or output being monitored by an LED control.

Default: 0 -
		 False

BackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default: Control

BorderStyle	Gets or sets the control's border style.

Default: Control

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled
		 or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

EventTaskType	Gets the task type of the function that
		 starts with the event.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

Font	Selects the font for the text in the
		 control.

Default: Microsoft
		 Sans Serif, 8.25pt.

FontBold	The bold attribute for the current font
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontItalic	The italic attribute for the current
		 font (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontName	The name for the current font (Only
		 available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: Microsoft Sans Serif

FontSize	The size for the current font in points
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 8.25

ForeColor	Selects the forecolor for the control.

Default: ControlText

Height	Specifies the height of the control.

Default:

ImageAlign	Gets or sets the alignment of an image
		 in the control.

Default: 4 -
		 MiddleLeft

ImageOff	Gets or sets the image that is displayed
		 when LED control is off.

Default: LedOff.ico

ImageOn	Gets or sets the image that is displayed
		 when LED control is on.

Default: LedRed.ico

IOBit	Sets the bit of IO to monitor for
		 an LED control.

Default: 0

IOType	Sets the type of IO to monitor
		 for an LED control.

Default: 0 -
		 Input

Left	Specifies
		 the left location of the control.

Default:

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 LED control.

Default: LEDxx

TabIndex	Sets the tab index for the control

Default: 0

Text	Sets the text for the LED control.

Default:

TextAlign	Determines alignment for the text.

Default: 1 -
		 Left

ToolTipText	Sets the text
		 for the tooltip.

Default:

Top	Sets the location of the top of the
		 LED control.

Default:

Visible	Sets if the
		 control is Visible or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Width	Sets the width
		 of the LED control.

Default:

Event	Description

DblClick	Executes when the user double clicks
		 the control with the mouse.
